response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience and proficiency in C/C++ (used in National Instruments role), but lacks direct experience with embedded firmware, Linux kernel modifications, and networking/security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, switch chip knowledge) required for the role. While their multilingual and polyglot background is impressive, the mismatch in core technical skills and industry experience is significant.
strengths: Strong C/C++ proficiency with real-world experience (National Instruments, Dunnhumby)
Multilingual capabilities (fluent English, Japanese not mentioned but German is basic)
Diverse technical background with embedded systems exposure (robotic arms, hardware control)
concerns: No direct experience with embedded firmware for LAN-switch products or Linux kernel modifications
Limited exposure to security technologies (e.g., encryption, attack detection) or networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP)
Japanese language proficiency not explicitly stated; critical for role requirements
